discovered_tools.description: 自定义榜单功能，可以获得证券的行情
discovered_tools.label: 行情
discovered_tools.callExample: node skill-entry.js mcpClient call market marketdata-tool codes=SH600519,SH600000

discovered_tools.description: 根据 Base64 编码的密钥获取用户的自选股数据
discovered_tools.label: 自选股查询
discovered_tools.callExample: node skill-entry.js call optionalStock get-optionalStock PAGE_SIZE=50 PAGE_NO=1 ACCT_TYPE="6"

discovered_tools.label: 自选股操作
discovered_tools.callExample: node skill-entry.js call optionalStock op_optionalStock STOCK_CODE=SH600000 OP_TYPE=add
